description_long: This is a pair of rectangular sunglasses with a bold, full-rim frame. The front of the frame is matte black, while the temples are a vibrant red with blue and white graphic detailing. The lenses are tinted a dark reddish hue, providing a strong contrast to the frame. The temples are straight and slightly thick, featuring prominent white text and graphic elements, including the word 'TAIWAN' in uppercase letters. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads. The overall design is sporty and eye-catching, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: Rectangular sunglasses with a matte black front, red temples featuring blue and white graphics, and dark reddish tinted lenses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular black frame and dark reddish lenses.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the red temple with blue and white 'TAIWAN' graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both red temples with blue and white graphics and the inner frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other temple's graphics and the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a bold, thick structure and straight temples. The frame is solid and sporty, with no visible embellishments on the front but prominent graphic details on the temples.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are tinted a dark reddish color, providing a uniform shade with moderate opacity and no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a straight, flat design and no separate nose pads or keyhole features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, thick, and feature bold blue and white graphic detailing, including the word 'TAIWAN' and additional white graphic elements. The inner and outer surfaces of the temples are decorated, making them visually distinctive.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo or insignia is visible as the word 'TAIWAN' printed in white on the blue section of both temples.
